prose:
Method provenance—Frontier-orbital gap (Koopmans HOMO–LUMO gap, eV)
• Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting) in PySCF v <engine default>
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied O2 structure at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz; no re-optimization (single-point DFT on that fixed geometry).
• Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge 0, multiplicity 3 (open-shell triplet handled with UKS).
• SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported by the engine. Integrity check status: ok (trustworthy = true).

Result
HOMO = –8.8739616 eV
LUMO = –3.5859031 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.2880586 eV

The calculation was executed with chemkit’s `frontier-orbitals` skill (single-point DFT) using the command recorded in the run metadata:
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 3 --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --out …/live.json
A live PySCF log was streamed during execution to the working directory (path reported at launch; tail-able for full SCF details).
